headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://connect.facebook.net; img-src 'self' data: https://www.facebook.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.facebook.com https://docs.google.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action https://docs.google.com; frame-src https://docs.google.com
